mnemonics: Percy Always Eats Delicious Cookies (P-A-E-D-C) for the IoT functional stack layers: Perception, Access, Edge, Data, Cloud
keyPoints: The Perception Layer includes sensors and actuators that interact with the physical world.
The Access Layer (Network Layer) handles communication and connectivity (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth).
The Data Layer manages the storage, processing, and analysis of the collected information.
commonMistakes: Thinking the Edge and Cloud layers are the same (Edge is for local, time-sensitive processing; Cloud is for heavy, long-term analytics).
Forgetting that actuators (output devices) are part of the Perception Layer, not just sensors (input devices).
